title: Redstone OptiUnity一体化红石优化
description: A redstone & optimization modpack for vanilla Minecraft  servers. 一款红石优化的整合包，适用于原版Minecraft服务器。
body:
# Redstone OptiUnity: All-in-One Redstone Optimization Pack  

## Overview  
Redstone OptiUnity is a **Fabric-based modpack** designed to enhance redstone mechanics in vanilla Minecraft servers. By leveraging performance mods like **Sodium** and utilities from the **MASA mod series**, this pack delivers:  
- ⚡ **Significant performance improvements** for redstone-heavy worlds.  
- 🧩 **Expanded redstone possibilities** for technical players.  
- 🔧 **Optimized vanilla mechanics** without altering core gameplay.  

## Key Features  
### Performance Boost  
- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) + [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium): 300%+ FPS increase.
### Redstone Enhancements  
- [**Tweakeroo**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo): Precision redstone placement & debugging.    
- [**Litematica**](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica): Schematic-based building for complex contraptions.  

### Multiplayer-Friendly  
- [**Essential Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential): Play with best friends, friendship never ends!
---  

# Redstone OptiUnity：一体化红石优化整合包  

## 概述  
Redstone OptiUnity 是一个基于 **Fabric** 的整合包，专为优化原版服务器的红石玩法而生。通过 **Sodium** 等性能模组和 **MASA 系列模组**，该整合包提供：  
- ⚡ 大幅提升红石机械的运行时性能  
- 🧩 为生电玩家拓展红石可能性  
- 🔧 优化原版机制，保留核心玩法  

## 核心功能  
### 性能优化  
- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) + [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)：帧率提升300%以上  

### 红石增强  
- [**Tweakeroo**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo)：精准红石放置与调试工具  
- [**Litematica**](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)：原理图建造，支持复杂机械设计  

### 多人游戏适配  
- [**Essential Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential): 与挚友嬉戏，情谊永不断绝！

> **Download** | 下载: | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/redstone-optiunity/versions)
